summary: Bug: leo bootstrap writes memories via os.WriteFile directly, bypassing JSONAdapter. index.json is stale after bootstrap — memories invisible to recall until manual leo reindex.

content.what: writeDrafts() in bootstrap.go uses os.WriteFile directly instead of JSONAdapter — index.json never rebuilt
content.impact: After leo bootstrap, seeded memories are invisible to recall, MCP search_memories, and any index-based lookup until manual leo reindex
content.root_cause: bootstrap.go:386-453 writeDraft() hand-marshals JSON and calls os.WriteFile. Three callsites: runBootstrap (line 137), runMultiRepoBootstrap (line 283), runBootstrapInline (line 555). None call adapter.Reindex().
content.fix: After writeDrafts returns, call storage.NewJSONAdapter(targetScope.Path).Reindex() at all three injection points
